25 Recipes and 3 Menus for the Ultimate Gathering

I’ve selected 25 recipes for you that are meant for celebrating. These dishes highlight the flavors of the African continent and influences from its diaspora, a focus of my work as a columnist for The Times.

All of the recipes are drawn from everyday life of places like Nigeria, Liberia, Kenya and Somalia. Each menu is a curated journey that tells a rich, textured story of a region — and is riddled with flavor!

The courses are an invitation to cater to your curiosity — appetizers that get your mouth moving, and mains that are technique-driven and protein dense, with vegetables cosplaying as vessels to drag sauce from plate to your mouth.
The final course is the time for delight and reflection. Take these dishes as an offering, a springy step forward over conversation, catching up, and sharing, for a memorable gathering.
Kelly Marshall for The New York Times. Food Stylist: Roscoe Betsill. Prop Stylist: Paige Hicks.
